seo.title: Exploreans Watamu Beach Club & Villas | Boutique Hotel on Kenya's Watamu Coast
seo.description: Exploreans Watamu Beach Club & Villas — a 17-villa boutique ecolodge with a private beach, two restaurants, swimming pool and wellness pavilion on Mayungu Bay, beside the Watamu Marine National Park, Kenya. All-inclusive available. Preserved, not produced.
